sentences.arabic: تُشْتَهَرُ الثَّقَافَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ بِالْكَرَمِ وَحُسْنِ الضِّيَافَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kultura je poznata po velikodušnosti i gostoprimstvu.
sentences.translationEn: Arab culture is famous for generosity and hospitality.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَقْبِلُ النَّاسُ الضُّيُوفَ بِتَرْحِيبٍ حَارٍّ فِي بُيُوتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi dočekuju goste sa toplom dobrodošlicom u svojim domovima.
sentences.translationEn: People welcome guests with a warm reception in their homes.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُونَ لَهُمُ الْقَهْوَةَ الْعَرَبِيَّةَ وَالتَّمْرَ اللَّذِيذَ.
sentences.translation: Služe im arapsku kafu i ukusne urme.
sentences.translationEn: They offer them Arabic coffee and delicious dates.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ قَدِيمَةٌ جِدًّا وَمُسْتَمِرَّةٌ حَتَّى الْآنَ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj običaj je veoma star i nastavlja se do danas.
sentences.translationEn: This custom is very old and continues to this day.

sentences.arabic: يَعْتَبِرُ الْعَرَبُ إِكْرَامَ الضَّيْفِ وَاجِبًا وَدَلِيلًا عَلَى الِاحْتِرَامِ.
sentences.translation: Arapi smatraju ugošćavanje gosta obavezom i dokazom poštovanja.
sentences.translationEn: Arabs consider honoring a guest a duty and a sign of respect.
